sql:
SELECT 
        	SOP.SOP_ID ,
            SOP.TICKET_ID ,
            SOP.TICKET_TYPE ,
            CASE WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'ATT2' THEN '이상 트래픽(Model-A)'
            WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'ATT2_AI' THEN '이상 트래픽(Model-C)'
            WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'NTT' THEN '유해 트래픽(Model-A)'
            WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'NTT_AI' THEN '유해 트래픽(Model-C)'
            WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'NFTT' THEN '장비 과부하 장애'
            WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'FTT' THEN '비장애'
            ELSE '장애' END AS TICKETTYPE,
            SOP.TICKET_RESULT ,
            SOP.STATUS ,
            TO_CHAR(SOP.REQUEST_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REQUEST_TIME,
            TO_CHAR(SOP.RECEIVE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RECEIVE_TIME,
            SOP.DETAIL ,
            SOP.FAULT_CLASSIFY ,
            SOP.FAULT_TYPE ,
            SOP.FAULT_DETAIL_CONTENT ,
            SOP.ETC_CONTENT ,
            SOP.AI_ACCURACY ,
            AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA ,
            AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ ,
            AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA ,
            AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ ,
            NODEA.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDRA ,
            NODEZ.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDRZ ,
            TC.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE AS ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE ,
            TO_CHAR(TC.FAULT_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FAULT_TIME ,
            SOP.HANDLING_ACK_USER AS HANDLING_ACK_USER ,
            TO_CHAR(SOP.HANDLING_ACK_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HANDLING_ACK_TIME ,
            SOP.HANDLING_FIN_USER AS HANDLING_FIN_USER ,
            TO_CHAR(SOP.HANDLING_FIN_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HANDLING_FIN_TIME,
            TRNTDI.TRAFFIC_TYPE AS TRAFFIC_TYPE
        FROM nia.tb_sop SOP
        LEFT JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON SOP.TICKET_ID = AL.TICKET_ID
        LEFT JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_current TC    ON SOP.TICKET_ID = TC.TICKET_ID
        LEFT JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NODEA ON NODEA.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA
        LEFT JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NODEZ ON NODEZ.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ
        LEFT JOIN RCA.TB_RCA_NTT_TICKET_DETAIL_INFO TRNTDI on TRNTDI.TICKET_ID = TC.TICKET_ID
        WHERE 1=1
            AND TC.PARENT_TICKET_ID IS NULL
            AND SOP.TICKET_ID LIKE '%' || 'NTT_SIMULATION' || '%'
        ORDER BY SOP.REQUEST_TIME DESC
